Classic Sketch Watercolor: soft pencil sketch outlines, delicate watercolor washes, vintage storybook aesthetic, muted pastel tones, textured watercolor paper, nostalgic and gentle.
Dreamy Flowing Watercolor: ethereal atmosphere, wet-on-wet technique, beautiful water blooms, soft bokeh, glowing light, vibrant but translucent colors, magical and whimsical.
Clean Healing Watercolor: minimalist composition, clean white background, bright airy colors, Studio Ghibli watercolor inspiration, cozy vibes, simple brushstrokes, high key lighting.
Bold Whimsical Art: naive art style, bold brushwork, salt texture effect, rich pigment, playful character design, high contrast watercolor, storybook illustration.
